description_long: This is a rectangular, portable Panasonic radio receiver with a predominantly black body and silver accents. The front face features a large horizontal speaker grille, two prominent silver tuning and volume knobs, and a frequency display window at the top, labeled with FM and MW bands. The back side is mostly flat with a battery compartment and a telescopic metal antenna that can be extended for better reception. The sides are plain, with the left side showing the profile of the knobs and the right side being featureless. The overall design is utilitarian and compact, suitable for carrying or placing on a flat surface in urban environments.
description: A compact, black Panasonic radio receiver with a large speaker grille, two silver knobs, and a frequency display window on the front.
description_view_0: The left side view shows a plain black surface with the edge of the frequency display and the top of the radio visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the speaker grille, two silver knobs, the frequency display window, and the Panasonic branding.
description_view_2: The right side view is mostly plain, with the side profile of the two silver knobs visible.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a flat black surface with a battery compartment, some labeling, and a telescopic antenna along the top edge.
